rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing annex blocks or clauses without changing unrelated architecture
Use only visible identifiers in repairs; do not introduce new identifiers without explicit whitelist
generic_rules: Repair validator diagnostics without changing unrelated architecture
Use only visible identifiers in repairs; do not introduce new identifiers without explicit whitelist
Place annex blocks in valid scopes according to component type or implementation context
Use AGREE logical operators such as `and`, `or`, `not(...)`, and implication `=>` in contracts
Write stateful equations using initialized temporal recurrence, for example `0.0 -> pre(t) + step`
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex
AGREE scalar declaration types are int, real, and bool
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not introduce new identifiers without explicit whitelist
Do not use comparison expressions with non-bool types
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
